'''dabuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encastage|encastage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encastage|encastage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dabuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbithith|dæbithith]] || [[word:dæbithij|dæbithij]] || [[word:dæbithish|dæbithish]] || [[word:dæbithi|dæbithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabubuthuth|dabubuthuth]] || [[word:dabubuthuj|dabubuthuj]] || [[word:dabubuthush|dabubuthush]] || [[word:dabubuthu|dabubuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabuthuth|dabuthuth]] || [[word:dabuthuj|dabuthuj]] || [[word:dabuthush|dabuthush]] || [[word:dabuthu|dabuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabufthuth|dabufthuth]] || [[word:dabufthuj|dabufthuj]] || [[word:dabufthush|dabufthush]] || [[word:dabufthuf|dabufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabuthuthu|dabuthuthu]] || [[word:dabuthuju|dabuthuju]] || [[word:dabuthushu|dabuthushu]] || [[word:dabuthuku|dabuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabuthuth|dabuthuth]] || [[word:dabuthuj|dabuthuj]] || [[word:dabuthush|dabuthush]] || [[word:dabuthu|dabuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabuthuthul|dabuthuthul]] || [[word:dabuthujul|dabuthujul]] || [[word:dabuthushul|dabuthushul]] || [[word:dabuthukul|dabuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabuthuthuthu|dabuthuthuthu]] || [[word:dabuthujuju|dabuthujuju]] || [[word:dabuthushushu|dabuthushushu]] || [[word:dabuthuku|dabuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabuthuthun|dabuthuthun]] || [[word:dabuthujun|dabuthujun]] || [[word:dabuthushun|dabuthushun]] || [[word:dabuthukun|dabuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabuthuthuoro|dabuthuthuoro]] || [[word:dabuthujuoro|dabuthujuoro]] || [[word:dabuthushuoro|dabuthushuoro]] || [[word:dabuthukuoro|dabuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
